The '''''Tyrannic''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], as part of the [[Braxant Sector Fleet]].

==History==
Under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nalgol]], ''Tyrannic'' was brought into the forces of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grodin Tierce]] after Nalgol was convinced of [[Flim (Human)|Flim's]] performance as [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. In that capacity, ''Tyrannic'' was outfitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking shield]] and took the lead in the [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. After its location was revealed, the ''Tyrannic'' led the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] retreat after being faced with overwhelming unified numbers.<ref name="VotF" />
